SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AddCustomer
Command class that implements the AddCustomer operation.
AddCustomerWindow
GUI window class for AddCustomer.
AddFlight
Command to add a new flight to the system.
AddFlightWindow
Dialog for adding new flights with validation.
AdminLoginWindow
GUI window class for AdminLogin.
AdminPortalWindow
GUI window class for AdminPortal.
AllTests
Test suite for the Flight Booking System using JUnit 5.
AuthenticationService
Service for handling user authentication.
BaseCommand
Abstract base class for all commands.
Booking
Represents a booking in the flight booking system.
Booking.BookingStatus
Enum representing the status of a booking
BookingDataManager
Manages the persistence of booking data.
BookingTest
 
CancelBooking
Command class that implements the CancelBooking operation.
CancelBookingWindow
GUI window for cancelling a booking.
CancellationFeeCalculator
CancellationFeeCalculator class for the Flight Booking System.
Command
Interface defining the contract for implementation.
CommandParser
Parses user input and creates appropriate Command objects.
Customer
Represents a customer in the flight booking system.
CustomerDataManager
Data manager class for persisting and loading Customer data.
CustomerTest
Comprehensive unit tests for the Customer class using JUnit 5.
DashboardWindow
Dashboard window displaying system statistics and analytics.
DataManager
Interface defining the contract for implementation.
DeleteCustomer
Command class that implements the DeleteCustomer operation.
DeleteCustomerWindow
GUI window for deleting a customer from the system.
DeleteFlight
Command class that implements the DeleteFlight operation.
DeleteFlightWindow
GUI window for deleting a flight from the system.
DynamicPricingStrategy
Defines the strategy pattern for flight pricing calculations.
DynamicPricingStrategyTest
 
Flight
Represents a flight in the booking system.
FlightBookingSystem
Represents the main flight booking system.
FlightBookingSystemData
Data manager class for persisting and loading FlightBookingSystemData data.
FlightBookingSystemException
FlightBookingSystemException class for the Flight Booking System.
FlightBookingSystemTest
 
FlightDataManager
Data manager class for persisting and loading Flight data.
FlightTest
Comprehensive unit tests for the Flight class using JUnit 5.
GUIUtils
 
Help
Command class that implements the Help operation.
IssueBooking
Command to issue (create) a new booking for a customer on a flight.
IssueBookingWindow
GUI window for creating a new booking.
ListCustomers
Command to list all customers in the system.
ListFlights
Command class that implements the ListFlights operation.
LoadGUI
Command class that implements the LoadGUI operation.
Main
Main class for the Flight Booking System.
MainWindow
GUI window class for Main.
PassengerBookFlightWindow
GUI window class for PassengerBookFlight.
PassengerCancelBookingWindow
Window for passengers to cancel their own bookings.
PassengerLoginWindow
GUI window class for PassengerLogin.
PassengerPortalWindow
GUI window class for PassengerPortal.
PassengerRegisterWindow
GUI window class for PassengerRegister.
PassengerSearchFlightsWindow
Window for passengers to search available flights.
PassengerUpdateBookingWindow
Window for passengers to update (rebook) their bookings.
PasswordUtil
Utility class for password hashing and verification.
PricingStrategy
Interface defining the contract for implementation.
Role
Enumeration defining constant values.
SearchFlights
Command class that implements the SearchFlights operation.
SearchFlightsWindow
GUI window for searching and filtering flights.
Session
Represents the current user session in the system.
ShowBooking
Command to show all bookings for a specific customer.
ShowPricing
Command class that implements the ShowPricing operation.
UpdateBooking
Command class that implements the UpdateBooking operation.
UpdateBookingWindow
GUI window for updating (rebooking) a booking to a different flight.
User
Represents a user in the flight booking system.
UserDataManager
Manages persistence of user data.
ValidationUtil
Utility class for input validation.
ViewCustomersWindow
GUI window for viewing all customers in the system.
ViewPassengersWindow
GUI window class for ViewPassengers.
WelcomeScreen
GUI window class for WelcomeScreen.
